grants.name: Victorian Sporting Club Grants (Round 2) — Category 4: Travel ONLY
grants.notes: ⚠️ SuperNova received Round 1 grants in Categories 2 and 3, so Round 2 is restricted to Category 4 (Travel) ONLY. $750 max for athletes selected for representative competition or training camps. Event must occur 17 Feb – 31 Aug 2026. Projects must not start before 8 April 2026.

grants.name: Hobsons Bay Make it Happen Grants
grants.notes: ⚠️ CLOSES TODAY 1pm. Total pool $495,000. Events & Festivals category ideal for TVS multicultural festivals. Must operate within Hobsons Bay — need presence or partnerships. Separate event permit required.

grants.name: Melton Community Grants 2025/26
grants.notes: ⚠️ Overall program closes 31 March but rolling assessment continues — next round closes 30 Apr. Up to $10K per financial year. Must benefit Melton residents. Mandatory Council Project Officer consultation before applying. Need to confirm operational presence in Melton.

grants.name: Federal Volunteer Grants 2025–26
grants.notes: EOIs through local Federal MP — contact electorate office ASAP. $66,665 per electorate. Must have 40%+ volunteer workforce. Two-stage: EOI to MP first, then invited to full application May 2026. Both orgs are volunteer-driven — strong fit.

grants.name: Local Sporting Champions (Round 4)
grants.notes: For individual coaches, officials and competitors aged 12–18 attending championships. +$200 for international/2000km+ travel. +$50 for rural electorates. Could support SuperNova U18 players.

grants.name: City of Melbourne Connected Neighbourhoods
grants.notes: Monthly assessment rounds. For community-led initiatives in Melbourne municipality. Only relevant if TVS delivers neighbourhood-level programs within City of Melbourne boundaries.

grants.name: City of Melbourne — Town Halls Scheme (CUTHS)
categories: Free venue use for NFP events
grants.notes: In-kind support for NFP organisations to use Melbourne Town Halls at no cost. Only relevant if TVS holds events within City of Melbourne.

grants.name: Whitehorse Community Grants 2026
grants.notes: NEW — Eastern suburbs. Open 10 March, closes 3 May 2026. Tiered grants up to $10K. Also Partnership Grants up to $40K/year for 4 years for vulnerable populations. Covers sport, multicultural, health & wellbeing. Must benefit Whitehorse community. Contact grants@whitehorse.vic.gov.au.

grants.name: Maroondah Annual Community Grants 2026/27
grants.notes: NEW — Eastern suburbs (covers Ringwood, Croydon, Heathmont). Up to $10K for one-off community projects. Verify deadline — council website says 2 April, SmartyGrants showed 22 March for some rounds. Contact grants@maroondah.vic.gov.au or 9298 4598.

grants.name: Maroondah Arts & Cultural Grants 2026/27
grants.notes: NEW — Eastern suburbs. Closes 2 April 2026. For projects that increase arts profile and participation. Could suit TVS cultural events if held in Maroondah. Contact grants@maroondah.vic.gov.au.

grants.name: Wyndham Medium Grants – Round 2
grants.notes: Strongest council opportunity — both orgs are Wyndham-based. Requires 2:1 co-contribution (volunteer hours at $45/hr count). New grants policy adopted 24 March 2026 — councillors no longer involved in decisions, assessed by officers. Priority groups include women, CALD communities, people with disability.

grants.name: Wyndham Small Grants
grants.notes: Rolling applications. Quick wins for equipment or small program costs. Up to $500 for individuals/unincorporated. Both orgs are Wyndham-based — easy eligibility.

closedGrants.name: ASF Active Kids Grant 2026
closedGrants.reason: Closed 27 March 2026. Equipment and uniforms for clubs with U20 members. Watch for next round ~March 2027.

closedGrants.name: Wyndham Community Pathways Scholarships
closedGrants.reason: Closed 6 March 2026. Individual scholarships for sport/arts/academic achievements. Watch for 2026-27 round opening ~August 2026.

closedGrants.name: Monash Community Grants 2025/26
closedGrants.reason: Closed March 2025. No current rounds on SmartyGrants. Watch for 2026/27 round ~January 2027.

closedGrants.name: City of Melbourne Community Inclusion Grants 2026-27
closedGrants.reason: Closed 9 February 2026. Next round likely opens late 2026.

closedGrants.name: City of Melbourne Community Events Grants 2026-27
closedGrants.reason: Closed 26 January 2026. Next round likely opens late 2026.

closedGrants.name: Change Our Game Community Activation Grants
closedGrants.reason: Closed for 2024-25. Up to $10K for women in sport. Watch changeourgame.vic.gov.au for 2025-26 round — excellent for SuperNova Women's program.

closedGrants.name: VicHealth Growing Healthy Communities (Round 2)
closedGrants.reason: Closed. Funded projects Mar 2026–Mar 2028. No new rounds announced.

closedGrants.name: Multicultural Festivals & Events Program 2024-25
closedGrants.reason: Rounds 1 & 2 both closed. Up to $50K. Watch for 2025-26 program — ideal for TVS Holi/Diwali.

closedGrants.name: Wyndham Arts Grants 2026
closedGrants.reason: Closed 14 January 2026. Watch for 2027 round announcements.

closedGrants.name: Knox Leisure Minor Capital Works Grant
closedGrants.reason: Closed 15 March 2026. Up to $10K for improvements on Council-leased land. Opens 1 Feb each year.

closedGrants.name: Knox Community Development Fund Grants 2025-26
closedGrants.reason: Closed late 2025. Includes sport/leisure, multicultural, and community strengthening categories. Watch for 2026-27 round opening mid-2026.

closedGrants.name: Sport & Rec Vic Significant Sporting Events Program
closedGrants.reason: Closed 15 February 2026. For national/international level events only.

upcomingGrants.name: City of Melbourne Annual Arts Grants 2027
upcomingGrants.note: Arts projects presented within City of Melbourne. Also art residencies (6 or 12 months, up to $5K).

upcomingGrants.name: Change Our Game Community Activation Grants 2025-26
upcomingGrants.note: Perfect for SuperNova Women's program. 3 streams: Participation, Education, Community Leaders. Must be incorporated NFP.

upcomingGrants.name: Multicultural Festivals & Events Program 2025-26
upcomingGrants.note: Strong fit for TVS multicultural events. Contact multicultural-festivals.events@dpc.vic.gov.au for updates.

upcomingGrants.name: VicHealth Active Club Grants (next round)
upcomingGrants.note: Women and girls' participation, social/modified sport. Strong fit for SuperNova women's programs.

upcomingGrants.name: Knox Community Development Fund Grants 2026-27
upcomingGrants.note: Eastern suburbs. Categories include sport/leisure, multicultural activities, community strengthening. Strong fit for SuperNova eastern expansion. Contact Community Partnerships on 9298 8000.

upcomingGrants.name: Wyndham Active Revitalisation Program
upcomingGrants.note: NEW: $3.75M program for Wyndham sport infrastructure. Requires lease/licence at a Wyndham Council sporting facility in last 12 months. SuperNova may not be eligible if ACM is private — check with Council.

upcomingGrants.name: Wyndham Large Grants 2026-27
upcomingGrants.note: For incorporated NFPs in Wyndham. New grants policy adopted 24 March 2026.
